channel.title: Ulta Beauty on WithinTrend — Trending Topics & Guides

item.title: Working at Ulta Beauty as a Sales Associate: Pay, Pros, Cons & What to Expect
item.description: A detailed guide to what it's like working as a sales associate at Ulta Beauty, covering pay, perks, daily tasks, and honest employee feedback.

item.title: Working at Ulta Beauty as a Prestige Beauty Advisor: Pay, Pros, Cons & What to Expect
item.description: An in-depth look at the Prestige Beauty Advisor role at Ulta Beauty, including pay rates, daily responsibilities, and real employee feedback.
